title: The Enchanted Castle
summaries: "The Enchanted Castle" by E. Nesbit is a children's fantasy novel published in 1907. Three siblings exploring during school holidays discover a mysterious country estate with marble statues, a maze, and a sleeping princess. When they find a magic ring that grants wishes, enchantment becomes real—but magic proves unpredictable and dangerous when wishes aren't carefully worded. Written for both children and adults, the novel blends imaginative play with subtle supernatural elements. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Great Britain -- History -- Edward VII, 1901-1910 -- Juvenile fiction
